title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 44
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost sports bag.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you finally find your sports bag? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the changing room, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Woman: And did you try the train platform? You said you went there afterwards. || Man: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my teacher sent me a message and said [1]I had left my sports bag in her car[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Woman: What a relief. You will need it later. || Man: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your sports bag? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the changing room, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you try the train platform? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my teacher sent me a message and said I had left my sports bag in her car. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where is the sports bag?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the sports bag in her car.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go cycling by the lake after school? I was looking forward to it. || Girl: I don't think so. The weather forecast says heavy rain, so that plan will not work today. || Woman: We could visit the museum instead. That might be fun. || Girl: I checked, but it is closed on Mondays. My cousin had a different idea: [1]we are going to make cakes at my aunt's house this afternoon[/1]. || Woman: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Girl: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to go cycling by the lake after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The weather forecast says heavy rain, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could visit the museum instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but it is closed on Mondays. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to make cakes at my aunt's house this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?

options.B: Make cakes at a relative's house

items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to make cakes at my aunt's house this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the art workshop.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you packed for the art workshop tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Boy: Almost. I was going to bring paintbrushes, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Man: What about an apron? Do we need that? || Boy: Not this time. The message says [1]everyone needs to bring an old newspaper because we need to cover the tables before painting[/1]. || Man: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Boy: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the art workshop tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring paintbrushes, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about an apron? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring an old newspaper because we need to cover the tables before painting.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring an old newspaper because we need to cover the tables before painting.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Man: Not yet. I considered the pizza, but there is cheese in it. || Woman: What about the vegetable wrap? It looks good today. || Man: I thought about that too, but I had one for breakfast. I think [1]I'll have the chicken rice because it is not too heavy[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Man: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the pizza, but there is cheese in it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the vegetable wrap? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but I had one for breakfast. I think I'll have the chicken rice because it is not too heavy.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the chicken rice because it is not too heavy.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the chess club.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you see the message about the chess club this afternoon? I was going straight to room seven. || Boy: Do not go there, because the room is being painted. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Girl: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the library. || Boy: That is wrong too, because it is being used for a reading event. The latest message says [1]we must meet in the canteen after lunch[/1]. || Girl: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Boy: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the chess club this afternoon? I was going straight to room seven.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because the room is being painted. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the library.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because it is being used for a reading event. The latest message says we must meet in the canteen after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the chess club?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in the canteen after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to my cousin's party.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to my cousin's party tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bus. || Man: I was, but the service ends early on Sundays, so it is not a good idea now. || Woman: Could you walk instead? It might be quicker. || Man: I checked, but it would take nearly an hour. [1]I'm going in my dad's car because he is going near her house anyway[/1]. || Woman: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Man: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How are you getting to my cousin's party tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bus.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was, but the service ends early on Sundays, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Could you walk instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it would take nearly an hour. I'm going in my dad's car because he is going near her house anyway.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to my cousin's party?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because he is going near her house anyway.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the cafe.
items.audio_script: Boy: What are you doing at the cafe this afternoon? I thought you had to wash cups. || Girl: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Boy: So are you going to make sandwiches instead? || Girl: No, because the chef has already prepared them. The manager said [1]my job today is to set the tables outside[/1]. || Boy: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Girl: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the cafe this afternoon? I thought you had to wash cups.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: So are you going to make sandwiches instead?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: No, because the chef has already prepared them. The manager said my job today is to set the tables outside.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to set the tables outside.
